headline: Yum! Brands faces Taco Bell traffic hit from Taylor Farms lettuce scare
summary: Yahoo Finance's Brooke DiPalma discusses the FDA walking back a false-positive test result while maintaining its ongoing investigation into Taylor Farms shredded lettuce linked to a multistate Cyclospora outbreak.
